2604.20357.title: SignDATA: Data Pipeline for Sign Language Translation
2604.20357.paper_summary: Sign-language datasets are difficult to preprocess consistently because they vary in annotation schema, clip timing, signer framing, and privacy constraints. Existing work usually reports downstream models, while the preprocessing pipeline that converts raw video into training-ready pose or video artifacts remains fragmented, backend-specific, and weakly documented. We present SignDATA, a config-driven preprocessing toolkit that standardizes heterogeneous sign-language corpora into comparable outputs for learning. The system supports two end-to-end recipes: a pose recipe that performs acquisition, manifesting, person localization, clipping, cropping, landmark extraction, normalization, and WebDataset export, and a video recipe that replaces pose extraction with signer-cropped video packaging. SignDATA exposes interchangeable MediaPipe and MMPose backends behind a common interface, typed job schemas, experiment-level overrides, and per-stage checkpointing with config- and manifest-aware hashes. We validate the toolkit through a research-oriented evaluation design centered on backend comparison, preprocessing ablations, and privacy-aware video generation on datasets. Our contribution is a reproducible preprocessing layer for sign-language research that makes extractor choice, normalization policy, and privacy tradeoffs explicit, configurable, and empirically comparable.Code is available at https://github.com/balaboom123/signdata-slt.
2604.20357.paper_summary_zh: 手語數據集因為標註架構、片段時長、簽署者框架和隱私限制的不同而難以一致地進行預處理。現有的研究通常報告下游模型，而將原始視頻轉換為訓練就緒的姿勢或視頻工件的預處理流程則仍然是零散的、特定於後端的，且文檔記錄薄弱。我們提出了SignDATA，一個以配置為驅動的預處理工具包，將異質的手語語料標準化為可比較的輸出以供學習。該系統支持兩種端到端的配方：一種姿勢配方，執行獲取、清單生成、人物定位、剪輯、裁剪、標誌提取、正規化和WebDataset導出；另一種視頻配方，則用簽署者裁剪的視頻包裝替代姿勢提取。SignDATA在一個通用接口、類型化的作業架構、實驗級別的覆蓋和每階段的檢查點中，暴露了可互換的MediaPipe和MMPose後端，並具備配置和清單感知的哈希。我們通過以後端比較、預處理消融和基於隱私的視頻生成為中心的研究導向評估設計來驗證該工具包。我們的貢獻是一個可重現的手語研究預處理層，使提取器選擇、正規化政策和隱私權衡變得明確、可配置且經驗可比較。代碼可在 https://github.com/balaboom123/signdata-slt 獲得。
2604.20357.author: Kuanwei Chen et.al.
